General.Name: Shuanghua Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Shuanghua Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, imports, exports, and sells automobile air-conditioner parts and components in China. The company operates through: Supply Chain Management Business; and Food supply Business segments. It also engages in research and development of automobile parts. It offers its products under the Shuanghua and Youshen brand names to domestic OEMs and international aftermarket customers. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Shuanghua Autoparts Co., Ltd. Shuanghua Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
